title: Gemini gets a major upgrade as Google adds 3-minute AI music generation: here's how it works
summary: Gemini's new Lyria 3 Pro integration enables the creation of 3-minute music tracks with improved fidelity and customization. It supports diverse applications, from study music to jingles, while adhering to copyright policies with embedded SynthID watermarks for content verification.

title: Reddit will now ask accounts with ‘fishy behavior’ to verify they are human: here's how it will work
summary: Reddit is implementing measures to ensure users interact with real people, not AI. Reddit CEO Steve Huffman announced a targeted verification system for suspicious accounts and the use of third-party tools to confirm human identity of its users.

title: WWDC 26: Apple to unveil dedicated Siri chatbot and systemwide AI agent in iOS 27, says report
summary: Apple is set to unveil a standalone Siri app and new features on June 8 at WWDC 26. The AI update, codenamed Campo, aims to provide a chatbot-like experience and deeper integration across iOS and Mac applications with the aim to turn it into a systemwide AI agent.

title: Samsung Galaxy A37, Galaxy A57 with Exynos SoC, 5,000mAh battery launched: Price, specs and more
summary: Samsung has launched the Galaxy A37 and A57, featuring triple cameras, 5,000mAh batteries, and AI enhancements. Both models offer a 6.7-inch FHD+ display, IP68 rating, and run on Android 16-based One UI 8.5, promising six years of updates.

title: Samsung Galaxy A37, A57 Launch LIVE: Galaxy A37, A57 launched in India
summary: Samsung Galaxy A57 & A37 Launch LIVE: Samsung to begin unveiling of the two phones from 5:30PM today. The Galaxy A57 could run on Exynos 1680SoC while the A37 could run on the Exynos 1480 chipset.

title: Infosys to acquire US firms Optimum Healthcare IT for $465 million, Stratus for $95 million
summary: Infosys has entered separate agreements to acquire US-based firms Optimum Healthcare IT and Stratus in all-cash deals. The company will purchase healthcare consulting firm Optimum for $465 million and insurance technology company Stratus for $95 million.

title: Jury reaches verdict in Meta, Google trial on social media addiction
summary: A Los Angeles jury reached a verdict on Wednesday in ​a landmark social media addiction trial ​that involves Meta's Instagram and Google's YouTube, according to spokespeople for the ​plaintiff and Meta.

title: Apple rolls out age checks for UK users
summary: Apple began rolling out age verification requirements for UK users as part of a software update Wednesday, as the government increases pressure on tech giants to better protect children online.

summary: The new initiative signals Zuckerberg's strategic push to build on one of Meta’s core strengths amid intensifying AI competition. Per a December 2025 report, 92% of businesses using the company’s platforms in India are MSMEs.

summary: A New Mexico jury has fined Meta 375 million dollars. This is the first verdict in child safety trials against social media companies. title: Claude down: Users report issues accessing the website, Claude Code and app
summary: Claude down: At around 7:14 PM, a total of 448 users reported issues. More than 57% of users experienced problems loading the website, while 24% could not access Claude Code. Another 19% reported issues with the app.

title: Apple to launch standalone AI-enhanced Siri app to rival ChatGPT at WWDC
summary: WWDC 2026: Apple will launch a standalone app for its Siri voice assistant, alongside a new “Ask Siri” feature, according to a report by Bloomberg on Wednesday. Currently in the testing phase, the app is part of the company’s broader artificial intelligence (AI) overhaul, the report added.

title: ETtech Explainer: Why is OpenAI shutting down Sora, its text-to-video app?
summary: OpenAI is shutting down its Sora video generation platform, including its app, API, and ChatGPT integrations, just over a year after its December 2024 launch.
